/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/camera/CameraController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/camera/OrthographicCamera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/camera/PerspectiveCamera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/config/AppConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/config/AppConfigValidation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/render/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/render/Transform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/vulkan/VulkanBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/vulkan/VulkanContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/vulkan/VulkanBootstrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/vulkan/VulkanDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/vulkan/VulkanPipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/vulkan/VulkanRender.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/vulkan/VulkanReporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/vulkan/VulkanShader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/vulkan/VulkanSwapchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/src/engine/window/Window.cpp.o -o Engine  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/chenhongchi/VulkanSDK/1.4.350.0/macOS/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /Users/chenhongchi/VulkanSDK/1.4.350.0/macOS/lib/libvulkan.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib
